title: Process Engineer Vacancy at H.B. Fuller India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at H.B. Fuller India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at H.B. Fuller India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About H.B. Fuller India:
H.B. Fuller India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
